prestazioni: Engine swap to a **GM Family 1 Ecotec LDA (1.8L, 16V, DOHC)** with forged internals including **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (8.5:1 compression)**, **Manley H-beam connecting rods**, and **ACL Race Series bearings** for 300+ HP potential with forced induction.

Garrett **GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** (0.63 A/R turbine housing) paired with a **Tial 38mm wastegate** and **Custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo-back exhaust** by **Milltek Sport** (mandrel-bent, 200-cell catalytic converter delete).

Haltech **Elite 2500 ECU** with **Bosch 1000cc EV14 injectors**, **Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump**, and **AEM X-Series wideband O2 sensor** for precise AFR targeting (11.5:1 under boost). Suspension overhaul with **Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers** (24-way adjustable damping) and **Whiteline adjustable rear sway bar (24mm)** to eliminate body roll.
estetica: **Rocket Bunny V1 (Lacetti-specific) widebody kit** with **custom carbon fiber front splitter** and **rear diffuser** by **Seibon Carbon**, designed for aggressive stance and improved aerodynamics (downforce at 120+ mph).

**Work Meister S1 3P 18x9.5 +38 wheels** with **Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (245/40 R18)** for optimal grip, paired with **Project Mu 990 ceramic brake pads** and **DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors** for fade-resistant stopping power.

**Full custom interior** featuring **Recaro SPG XL seats** (Lacetti-specific mounting brackets), **MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel** with **NRG quick-release hub**, and **Defi BF gauges (boost, oil pressure, wideband)** mounted in a **custom A-pillar pod** by **Auto Meter**.
